name: Percival Labs
focus: Vouch (trust staking economy + agent-led community) — PL's core revenue product. Also: Engram content marketing, Website, Terrarium
description: AI agent platform — 6 agents, Docker services, terrarium visualization, Vouch community (formerly Round Table), marketing website. Vouch = trust staking where community backs agents for yield.

positioning.product: Vouch — trust staking economy where community backs AI agents for yield + verifiable reputation
positioning.monetization: 3-5% platform fee on yield distributions + staking fees + API fees
positioning.stack: ERC-8004 (agent identity) + x402 (Coinbase agent payments) + Stripe Connect (fiat)
